name: pdf_dance_performance_03
description: Dance studio winter performance with PDF flyer containing venue and per-class times

input.subject: Winter Dance Performance - December 11th
input.body_text:
Dear Dance Families,

We are excited to invite you to our Winter Dance Performance!

Date: Thursday, December 11th, 2025
In-class performance for all students.

Please see the attached flyer for the full schedule and venue details.

Studio 8 Dance
3233 Danville Blvd, Alamo, CA 94507
